name: 10 Blaze Escape
short_description: *If you have a weak heart, we do not recommend playing this game. It is too scary, so we recommend that only those with a strong heart play this game.
detailed_description:
"10 Blaze Escape" is an escape horror game where you aim to escape by lighting 10 flames.

However, there is something wandering around the maze, and if it finds you, it will chase you at an incredible speed. Even if you are shocked and knocked out, it won't stop. "Hey, get up quickly! Run away quickly."

- Gameplay: Move carefully through the maze so that the ghosts don't find you. Don't be surprised by a sudden encounter lol

- Three difficulty levels: "Easy", "Base", which can be enjoyed by beginners, and the ultimate difficulty level "Very Hard" (impossible game lol) In Very Hard mode, your clear time will be reflected in the world ranking (Steam leaderboard), so do your best!

- Music: The music I borrowed from Hasimami-san is the best, it enhances the sense of fear and increases the sense of immersion. Thank you very much.
